description: CompositionWhite and pink printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has flower print at the hem, with three-quarter sleeves that have elasticated hems, split U-neck with a chest buttoned placket, crochet lace around the upper bust line and placket, has pin tucks along the bust and slits on the sides of the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this pink printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this printed kurta, what with its bright flowers towards the hem, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely comfortable through the day. Team this kurta with leggings or a loose white kameez and chunky accessories for a great look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
